x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Client scripts that run on incident load or change events can interfere with Now Assist form interactions. This check identifies customizations that may need adjustment before Now Assist agent assist is enabled.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom client scripts on incident and task. Scripts that run on form load or field change may interfere with Now Assist panel rendering. Test in sub-production before Now Assist enablement. Target: <30 custom active client scripts.
